text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The sun has fallen, and all are asleep on this holy
night. All except...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Shuffle...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, look at Palmer all sound asleep. Now, for her
present...

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Waheey! Whatcha looking at, Palmer? Golf stuff?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, I'm checking out these gloves. I've been
wanting to replace my old pair, and the latest
ones just dropped.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
But I'm short on cash, so I'm just window shopping
today. Haha!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Ta-da! A pair of golf gloves, just for you!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Your cheerful personality never fails to lift my
spirits, Palmer. I hope these are to your liking.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Now... who's next?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Snrk! Zzz...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Nice, she's fast asleep. I've got just the thing for a
good girl like her...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Waaaah!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Oh dear. What bothers you so, Fukukitaru?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Fujiii! I m-misplaced my most precious lucky
amulet!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Calm down now, deep breaths. Don't worry, it'll
turn up sooner or later. Do you remember the last
time you saw it?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Gurk! Sniff... Um, I remember bringing it with me to the field...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I found your amulet! Hehe, this one took me a
while—the academy field is quite large!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
...Anyhow, good thing I could find it. I hope you
break into that wonderful smile of yours again.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Time ticks by on this holy night, along with its
surreptitious surprises.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I think that's the last of the presents. Hehe, I can't
wait to see everyone's faces tomorrow.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: ...Achoo!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Haha, I'm really feeling the cold now. Guess it's
time to get snug in my bed.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Suddenly, a flash catches Fuji Kiseki's eye, and
she looks up to the sky. There, high above the
clouds, she sees...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
A shooting star on this holy night. What a stellar
present.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: I might as well make a wish.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Please, grant these girls enough happiness to last
a lifetime.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Morning arrives, and Ritto Dormitory buzzes with
festive voices.
